claims.summary: Bracketed phase-transition language should become a replyable transition artifact instead of remaining only text.
claims.rationale: Codex repaired the correspondence test inbox helper to use the production transition payload/artifact fallback; bracketed phase-transition tests now pass.

claims.summary: Transition objects should carry phenomenology/shared visibility and durable cards that peers can witness.
claims.rationale: `phase_transitions.rs` writes replyable transition cards with transition IDs, phenomenology, spectral/fill context, joint visibility, and witness records; transition-card tests pass.

claims.summary: Replies should be able to address a TransitionID with language-only witness semantics.
claims.rationale: Correspondence trace and transition-card tests verify `I_RECEIVED_THIS`, trace, witness, and transition artifact metadata without behavior-unlocking control.
